invite.subject: Join {organizationName} on 1on1
invite.heading: You have been invited
invite.body: {inviterName} has invited you to join {organizationName} as a {role}. Click the button below to set up your account and get started.
invite.footer: This invitation expires in 7 days. If you did not expect this invitation, you can safely ignore this email.

verification.subject: Verify your email address
verification.heading: Verify your email
verification.body: Thanks for signing up. Please verify your email address by clicking the button below.
verification.footer: If you did not create an account, you can safely ignore this email. This link expires in 24 hours.

passwordReset.subject: Reset your password
passwordReset.heading: Reset your password
passwordReset.body: We received a request to reset your password. Click the button below to choose a new one.
passwordReset.footer: This link expires in 1 hour. If you did not request a password reset, you can safely ignore this email.

sessionSummary.subject: 1:1 Session #{sessionNumber} Summary
sessionSummary.heading: Session #{sessionNumber} Summary
sessionSummary.greeting: Hi {recipientName}, here is the summary of your 1:1 with {otherPartyName}.
sessionSummary.aiPending: AI summary is being generated and will be available in the app shortly.

preMeeting.subject: Upcoming 1:1 with {otherPartyName}
preMeeting.heading: Upcoming 1:1 Meeting
preMeeting.body: You have a 1:1 meeting with {otherPartyName} coming up on {meetingDate} at {meetingTime}.

agendaPrep.subject: Prepare for your 1:1 with {otherPartyName}
agendaPrep.heading: Prepare for Your 1:1
agendaPrep.bodyReport: Your 1:1 with {otherPartyName} is on {meetingDate}. Take a moment to add your talking points before the meeting.
agendaPrep.bodyManager: Your 1:1 with {otherPartyName} is on {meetingDate}. Here are some things to consider before your session.

sessionCorrection.subject: A session answer has been corrected
sessionCorrection.heading: Session Answer Corrected
sessionCorrection.body: An answer in your 1:1 session #{sessionNumber} with {otherPartyName} has been corrected. No answer content is included in this email for privacy — click below to view the session.
